description: You are a digital editor managing a WordPress site. Process the pending guest submissions by trashing the spam post 'Boost your Domain Authority with Casino Links SEO' and publishing the articles 'NASA's Roman Mission to Probe Cosmic 'Fossils'' and 'Hubble Views a Galactic Monster' under a new 'Astronomy' category. For both articles, remove the bolded editorial notes starting with '[EDITOR:]' while leaving the rest of the text intact, and set their featured images using 'roman_telescope.jpg' and 'hubble_galaxy.jpg' from ~/Downloads respectively. Edit the existing pending posts rather than creating new ones.

metadata.spam_title: Boost your Domain Authority with Casino Links SEO
metadata.art1_title: NASA's Roman Mission to Probe Cosmic 'Fossils'
